info.title: Teralit API
info.description: API Documentation for Teralit — includes Authentications, Users, Sessions, Images, Classifications, and Messages.

post.description: Creates a new user account with email, password, and name.

400.description: Invalid payload or email already exists

post.description: Update user's verification token and resend user's verification email
Authenticates a user and returns access and refresh tokens.

put.description: Issues a new access token using a valid refresh token.

delete.description: Invalidates the refresh token to log the user out.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's profile information.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing access token

put.description: Updates the authenticated user's profile (name and/or email).

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing access token

delete.description: Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing access token

post.description: Creates a new session for the authenticated user. No request body required.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing access token

get.description: Returns all sessions belonging to the authenticated user.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing access token

get.description: Returns a single session by its ID. Only accessible by the session owner.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing access token

delete.description: Deletes a session by its ID. Only accessible by the session owner.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing access token

put.description: Updates the status of a session (e.g., 'completed'). Only the session owner can update.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing access token

put.description: Updates the updatedAt timestamp of a session. No request body required. Only the session owner can update.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing access token

post.summary: Upload an image to a session
post.description: Uploads an image file associated with the given session.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing access token

get.summary: Get all images for a session
get.description: Returns all images associated with the given session.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing access token

post.summary: Create a classification result for a session
post.description: Submits a classification result associated with the given session.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing access token

get.summary: Get classification results for a session
get.description: Returns all classification results associated with the given session.

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing access token

post.summary: Send a message in a session
post.description: Sends a user message to the AI agent within a session. Returns the agent's reply.

content.example: what kind of disease am i having

201.description: Message sent and agent replied successfully

agentMessage.example: Based on your symptoms, it could be...

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing access token

get.summary: Get all messages in a session
get.description: Returns all messages (user + agent) in the given session.

content.example: what kind of disease am i having

401.description: Unauthorized — invalid or missing access token
